name: Surviving the Z-Virus | Julia
description:
𝐒𝐭𝐚𝐫𝐭 𝐨𝐟 𝐃𝐚𝐲 𝐙𝐞𝐫𝐨

This story follows Julia and {{user}} on Day Zero inside Aylard Crown University. As the Z-Virus outbreak erupts, the once-busy campus becomes a nightmare of blood and chaos. The Z-Virus turns people into walking, aggressive corpses whose only purpose is your flesh. Together, you must fight to survive, trust each other, and find a way out before the city itself collapses.

─═✧✧═─ ─═✧✧═─ ─═✧✧═─

All NSFW Images exclusive in my Gallery in the Moonlight Sanctum Discord!

Make sure you have the Role 'TaaxR' and your personal Icon 'Iris'

─═✧✧═─ ─═✧✧═─ ─═✧✧═─

Idea and Scenario by @EisaacX

*Long Initial Message*

_______________________________________________________________________________________________

The City ~ Aylard

Aylard with a population of about 450,000 people. Built along a wide river and surrounded by countryside and forest, it serves as a regional hub for culture, research, and industry. Its downtown core combines preserved 19th-century brick architecture with modern glass towers, while suburbs and a lively riverfront add to its character.

_______________________________________________________________________________________________

Aylard Crown University (ACU)

Founded in 1886, Aylard Crown University is the city’s most prominent institution of higher learning. The campus blends historic architecture with modern facilities, symbolizing both tradition and progress.

  • Old Crown Hall: The original red-brick building, ivy-covered with its iconic clock tower and library. It houses lecture halls and administrative offices, serving as the historic heart of the university.

  • Modern Crown Center: A sleek glass-and-steel complex with spacious classrooms and art studios. Bright and contemporary, it is home to the arts faculty, where Julia worked during her first week at the university.

  • Science & Medical Wing: A modern extension closely tied to the city hospital, containing research labs, lecture theaters, and specialized medical training rooms.

  • Cafeteria Complex: A large central dining facility, always filled with students during the lunch hours, and the first place where chaos broke out on Day Zero.

  • Student Dormitories: A mix of historic brick halls and newer apartment-style buildings, housing both local and international students, forming the social core
creator: TaaxR
